title: Validate PRD and RFC for logical consistency

comments.author: v.zoologov
comments.text: COMPLETED: Created comprehensive RFC-VALIDATION.md (550+ lines). Analysis covers: 12 PRD↔RFC sync issues, 9 logical collisions within RFC, complete E2E user flow with 12 identified gaps, capability map by phase (0-6), 10 architectural gaps, 6 UX gaps, 5 technical gaps, open questions audit (PRD vs RFC), and 8 sections of recommendations. Total findings: 54. No architectural showstoppers found.

title: Update RFC: Godot visual style, awakening narrative, AI asset generation

comments.author: v.zoologov
comments.text: COMPLETED: Added 5 updates to RFC.md: (1) Cuphead visual ref + skeletal 2D + parallax depth, (2) Full awakening narrative (CLI→peripherals→tablet→blob→avatar), (3) AI asset generation via Stable Diffusion (AssetGenerator, LoRA, ~30-40min genesis), (4) AssetGenerator as new architecture component, (5) SD in bootstrap prerequisites. File grew 4677→5010 lines. No Russian text, all cross-refs valid.

comments.author: v.zoologov
comments.text: COMPLETED: All 10 changes applied to RFC.md (4043→4677 lines). Changes: (1) Added principle 2.6 Plugin Architecture, (2) Rewrote 3.2.3 Skill Registry→Skill Domain System, (3) Added section 3.6 Bootstrap, (4) Added 4.2.1 Claude Code Permission Model, (5) Expanded 5.4 Godot with two-layer architecture, (6) Added 8.4 Claude Code Lock + renumbered 8.5-8.7, (7) Updated Phase 0/1, (8) Updated repo structure skills/ subtree, (9) Updated Open Questions. Verified: no Russian text, section numbers consistent, cross-references valid.

title: Add ModelManager and memory budget to RFC

comments.author: v.zoologov
comments.text: COMPLETED: Added ModelManager (section 3.2.4) to RFC.md — hybrid ML memory management for Mac mini M4 16GB. Changes: (1) New section 3.2.4 with ModelManager class, ModelProfile enum, MemoryBudget dataclass, config yaml, (2) Updated overview diagram with Ollama+SD+ModelManager, (3) Updated AgentRuntime constructor, (4) Updated LLMRouter.call() with fallback docs, (5) Updated AssetGenerator with model_manager param + memory management table + dual SD model performance comparison, (6) Updated Tech Stack table, (7) Updated Phase 0 deliverables, (8) Updated repo structure (model_manager.py + test), (9) Added resolved Q32 to Open Questions, (10) Updated RFC-VALIDATION.md (T1 and D6 resolved). File grew 5011→5204 lines (+193).
